payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial top view of a dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with a glossy finish and beveled front corner; visible surface wear and small chips at the front edge, a rectangular top with decorative coasters/objects on it, edge-cropped in the image and seen at approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
